corrections_verified: anti-hopping-loophole: Act number A1663 verified against the gazetted Constitution (Amendment) (No. 3) Act 2022
article-49a-text: paraphrase correctly reflects resignation/ceasing-membership trigger and expulsion exclusion
malapportionment: 1957 fifteen per cent cap and 1973 removal verified
malapportionment: Bangi and Igan PRU15 voter counts verified
pejuang-2020: Aug 2020 announcement / Jul 2021 registration verified
corrections_still_inadequate: malapportionment: '1962 loosened to roughly one-third' — the specific one-third number not verified from primary text
pejuang-2020: '121 seats' attribution should distinguish announced from final contested
pejuang-2020: 'almost every candidate forfeited' needs candidate-level tally or softer wording
base-rates: qualitative replacement is safer than percentages but still an empirical claim without disclosed dataset
sabah-volatility: 'none of the RCI recommendations substantively implemented' too strong without primary source
sarawak-fiscal-lever: 'denial of development funds' and 'active suppression' need stronger attribution
new_errors_introduced_during_synthesis: launches-timeline: 'Wan Azizah - first woman in Malaysian history to found and lead a political party' is INCORRECT — Ganga Nayar founded and led the Malaysian Workers' Party in 1978
tldr and sarawak-fiscal-lever: 'active suppression of opposition voice' is causal framing not supported by cited fiscal/seat-count data alone

act_number_resolution.notes: A1663 confirmed via gazetted Act text. AGC records identify A1648 as the Occupational Safety and Health (Amendment) Act 2022 — entirely unrelated to anti-hopping.

items_still_blocking_publication: Resolve 1962 malapportionment 'one-third' claim: cite primary amendment/Hansard or remove the specific number
Remove or correct Wan Azizah 'first woman in Malaysian history' claim — Ganga Nayar (1978) preceded her
Tighten GTA/Pejuang GE15 wording: distinguish 'announced 121 candidates' from final EC-verified contested count
Replace 'almost every candidate forfeited deposit' with sourced candidate-level tally or softer wording
Verify all pending fig-2 constituency voter counts against EC documents — note: this was completed in the editor verification batch round which this rerun did not have access to
Verify all fig-3 Sarawak SST annual revenue figures — note: also completed in the editor verification batch round
Source or remove fig-5 branch-chair count of 300-500 per division
Soften or source Sabah RCI implementation claim with current parliamentary evidence
Add named attribution to Sarawak claims on opposition suppression and development-fund denial
overall_assessment: The synthesis fixed most of the original hard factual errors: Act A1663 is correct, Article 49A is now accurately paraphrased, the expulsion exclusion is correct, Bangi's voter count is corrected, Amanah's date is corrected, Pejuang's formation and registration dates are corrected, and the Shapley arithmetic is now right. However, the dossier is not yet publication-ready because it introduces one serious new biographical error about Wan Azizah, retains an unverified 1962 malapportionment number, and still uses several strong causal or empirical framings without a disclosed dataset or primary-source support. The factual position has improved substantially from the prior 60 score, but it does not clear the above-85 publication threshold yet.
